title: 黑警記者會發放不實資料，公然扭曲NYT報導

replies.msg:
取自電蟲剪報小組：
「闢謠：
－ NYT 話警方喺政總20樓施放TG，我哋當日冇派員喺政總高處嘅，應該係向天射跌返落嚟。但當日有暴力示威者喺夏慤橋用丫叉同磚頭嘅，於是當日有喺政總4、5樓平台到攻擊嗰啲示威者。」

NYT報導原文：https://www.nytimes.com/interactive/2019/08/18/world/asia/hong-kong-tear-gas.html

NYT分析8月5日黑警於金鐘使用tear gas的情況時，使用了以下片段：


NYT明確指出「Officers’ exact position is unclear, but the rounds’ trajectories suggest that the police are stationed on a building high above.」，並沒有肯定地說黑警於政總20樓發放tear gas。

NYT亦列出安全使用tear gas的標準，「Experts say officers should fire tear gas canisters a short distance toward the edges of a crowd.」，如下圖所示：


NYT引述專家發言，從高處發射tear gas本身就有機會死人，與是否係政總20樓發放無關：
Shooting from such a position is reckless, Mr. Bueermann said, because the tear gas canisters fall to the ground at a high speed. Most canisters collected by protesters have been six-inch-round metal shells. “I have never seen that before,” he said. “I think that is hugely problematic. If it hits someone in the head, you could kill them.”

黑警將NYT報導扭曲成「係政總20樓發放tear gas」，無視報導中列出，有關安全使用tear gas的標準，係刻意隱瞞、誤導大眾，亦係公然令NYT的聲譽受到傷害。
黑警記者會以闢謠之名黎散播謠言！

Quote from "Bug Bug News Clip" (電蟲剪報小組) in Telegram:
(https://t.me/bugbugnewsclip/8623)

Rumors:
- NYT said that the Police force shot tear gases on 20th floor of government HQ, but we do not have officers being sent to the high level of floors in govt HQ, so we think (such tear gas that dropped from sky high) are because of shooting to the sky from the ground. However, there are some riot protestors using bricks and slingshot, and we did really have attacking those protestors from 4-5/F platform from ground level.


NYT news report source: https://www.nytimes.com/interactive/2019/08/18/world/asia/hong-kong-tear-gas.html

NYT had investigated how the POPO used tear gas in Admiralty, with this video as reference:


NYT pointed out explicitly that "Officers’ exact position is unclear, but the rounds’ trajectories suggest that the police are stationed on a building high above." They do not have explicitly stated that the POPO shot tear gas cans from 20/F of Government HQ.

NYT has also listed the safety standards to use tear gas: "Experts say officers should fire tear gas canisters a short distance toward the edges of a crowd." See below picture:


NYT then quoted an expert said, that shooting tear gas from a high level to the ground may cause death, which does not related to whether do they shoot at 20/F or not:
"Shooting from such a position is reckless, Mr. Bueermann said, because the tear gas canisters fall to the ground at a high speed. Most canisters collected by protesters have been six-inch-round metal shells. “I have never seen that before,” he said. “I think that is hugely problematic. If it hits someone in the head, you could kill them.”"

These POPO twisted the statements in this NYT news report as "shooting tear gas from 20/F of Government HQ", without noticing the code of using tear gas safely listed in the article. This is intentionally concealing and misleading the public, which is also damaging NYT’s reputation publicly.

Q & A
Q1. 我去邊都得, 點知邊度缺人?
A1. TG channel會用嚟作即時發佈~
https://t.me/HKWay
Q2. 馬路點連?
A2. 不阻塞交通 綠燈連 用創意既手法連~ 又或者唔連~
Q3. 開手機燈點拖手?
A3. 大家一齊右手拎手機 左手拖住隔離既人既右手~
Q4. 幾時要開燈?
A4. 覺得差唔多形成人鏈就開得啦~
Q5. 會唔會有路線圖?
A5. 我地一有確實既路線圖就會公佈~
Q6. 有無dress code?
A6. 無~ 擔心會落雨既人士可以帶傘~
Q7. 除左果三條線外 其他路線係咪你地有份搞?
A7. 係其他網民自發搞既
Q8. 係咪一定要7點到?
A8. 組成人鏈需時都需要熱心既你地幫手! 希望大家可以7點到! 唔能夠7點到既都歡迎到時加入架!!!
Q9. 我果區無集合點 可以去邊?
A9. 麻煩留意Tg channel 邊度唔夠人就去邊度~ 或者3條線隨便去一個位~
Q10. 係咪會有人影相?
A10. 呢個活動既目的之一係想俾全世界都望到香港發生咩事~ 我地歡迎媒體，熱心市民同埋好奇街坊影相~
